stemHtml: How many of the so called Rapid Eye Movement (REM) stages do we usually experience during a normal night’s sleep, and how frequently do they occur?

options.a: 3 to 4 REM stages that occur every 140 minutes to 180 minutes.
options.b: 4 to 5 REM stages that occur every 90 minutes to 120 minutes.
options.c: 1 to 2 REM stages that occur every 180 minutes to 240 minutes.
options.d: 6 to 7 REM stages that occur every 60 minutes to 70 minutes.
